--- # TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework ## News - [2026-03] **TradingAgents v0.2.2** released with GPT-5.4/Gemini 3.1/Claude 4.6 model coverage, five-tier rating scale, OpenAI Responses API, Anthropic effort control, and cross-platform stability. - [2026-02] **TradingAgents v0.2.0** released with multi-provider LLM support (GPT-5.x, Gemini 3.x, Claude 4.x, Grok 4.x) and improved system architecture. - [2026-01] **Trading-R1** [Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.11420) released, with [Terminal](https://github.com/TauricResearch/Trading-R1) expected to land soon.
> ?? **TradingAgents** officially released! We have received numerous inquiries about the work, and we would like to express our thanks for the enthusiasm in our community. > > So we decided to fully open-source the framework. Looking forward to building impactful projects with you!
?? [TradingAgents](#tradingagents-framework) | ? [Installation & CLI](#installation-and-cli) | ?? [Demo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=90gr5lwjIho) | ?? [Package Usage](#tradingagents-package) | ?? [Contributing](#contributing) | ?? [Citation](#citation)
## TradingAgents Framework TradingAgents is a multi-agent trading framework that mirrors the dynamics of real-world trading firms. By deploying specialized LLM-powered agents: from fundamental analysts, sentiment experts, and technical analysts, to trader, risk management team, the platform collaboratively evaluates market conditions and informs trading decisions. Moreover, these agents engage in dynamic discussions to pinpoint the optimal strategy.

> TradingAgents framework is designed for research purposes. Trading performance may vary based on many factors, including the chosen backbone language models, model temperature, trading periods, the quality of data, and other non-deterministic factors. [It is not intended as financial, investment, or trading advice.](https://tauric.ai/disclaimer/) Our framework decomposes complex trading tasks into specialized roles. This ensures the system achieves a robust, scalable approach to market analysis and decision-making. ### Analyst Team - Fundamentals Analyst: Evaluates company financials and performance metrics, identifying intrinsic values and potential red flags. - Sentiment Analyst: Analyzes social media and public sentiment using sentiment scoring algorithms to gauge short-term market mood. - News Analyst: Monitors global news and macroeconomic indicators, interpreting the impact of events on market conditions. - Technical Analyst: Utilizes technical indicators (like MACD and RSI) to detect trading patterns and forecast price movements.

### Researcher Team - Comprises both bullish and bearish researchers who critically assess the insights provided by the Analyst Team. Through structured debates, they balance potential gains against inherent risks.

### Trader Agent - Composes reports from the analysts and researchers to make informed trading decisions. It determines the timing and magnitude of trades based on comprehensive market insights.

### Risk Management and Portfolio Manager - Continuously evaluates portfolio risk by assessing market volatility, liquidity, and other risk factors. The risk management team evaluates and adjusts trading strategies, providing assessment reports to the Portfolio Manager for final decision. - The Portfolio Manager approves/rejects the transaction proposal. If approved, the order will be sent to the simulated exchange and executed.

## Installation and CLI ### Installation Clone TradingAgents: ```bash git clone https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents.git cd TradingAgents ``` Create a virtual environment in any of your favorite environment managers: ```bash conda create -n tradingagents python=3.13 conda activate tradingagents ``` Install the package and its dependencies: ```bash pip install . ``` ### Required APIs TradingAgents supports multiple LLM providers. Set the API key for your chosen provider: ```bash export OPENAI_API_KEY=... # OpenAI (GPT) export GOOGLE_API_KEY=... # Google (Gemini) export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=... # Anthropic (Claude) export XAI_API_KEY=... # xAI (Grok) export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=... # OpenRouter export ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY=... # Alpha Vantage ``` For local models, configure Ollama with `llm_provider: "ollama"` in your config. Alternatively, copy `.env.example` to `.env` and fill in your keys: ```bash cp .env.example .env ``` ### CLI Usage Launch the interactive CLI: ```bash tradingagents # installed command python -m cli.main # alternative: run directly from source ``` You will see a screen where you can select your desired tickers, analysis date, LLM provider, research depth, and more.

An interface will appear showing results as they load, letting you track the agent's progress as it runs.

## TradingAgents Package ### Implementation Details We built TradingAgents with LangGraph to ensure flexibility and modularity. The framework supports multiple LLM providers: OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, xAI, OpenRouter, and Ollama. ### Python Usage To use TradingAgents inside your code, you can import the `tradingagents` module and initialize a `TradingAgentsGraph()` object. The `.propagate()` function will return a decision. You can run `main.py`, here's also a quick example: ```python from tradingagents.graph.trading_graph import TradingAgentsGraph from tradingagents.default_config import DEFAULT_CONFIG ta = TradingAgentsGraph(debug=True, config=DEFAULT_CONFIG.copy()) # forward propagate _, decision = ta.propagate("NVDA", "2026-01-15") print(decision) ``` You can also adjust the default configuration to set your own choice of LLMs, debate rounds, etc. ```python from tradingagents.graph.trading_graph import TradingAgentsGraph from tradingagents.default_config import DEFAULT_CONFIG config = DEFAULT_CONFIG.copy() config["llm_provider"] = "openai" # openai, google, anthropic, xai, openrouter, ollama config["deep_think_llm"] = "gpt-5.2" # Model for complex reasoning config["quick_think_llm"] = "gpt-5-mini" # Model for quick tasks config["max_debate_rounds"] = 2 ta = TradingAgentsGraph(debug=True, config=config) _, decision = ta.propagate("NVDA", "2026-01-15") print(decision) ``` See `tradingagents/default_config.py` for all configuration options. ## Contributing We welcome contributions from the community! Whether it's fixing a bug, improving documentation, or suggesting a new feature, your input helps make this project better. If you are interested in this line of research, please consider joining our open-source financial AI research community [Tauric Research](https://tauric.ai/). ## Citation Please reference our work if you find *TradingAgents* provides you with some help :) ``` @misc{xiao2025tradingagentsmultiagentsllmfinancial, title={TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework}, author={Yijia Xiao and Edward Sun and Di Luo and Wei Wang}, year={2025}, eprint={2412.20138}, archivePrefix={arXiv}, primaryClass={q-fin.TR}, url={https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.20138}, } ```

- Repo: github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents

- Language: Python

- Authors: Yijia Xiao, Edward Sun, Di Luo, Wei Wang

Architecture:
1. Analyst Team (Fundamentals, Sentiment, News, Technical)


2. Researcher Team (Bullish & Bearish)
3. Trader Agent
4. Risk Management & Portfolio Manager

Built on LangGraph with support for multiple LLM providers including OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, xAI, OpenRouter, and Ollama, using tools like yfinance, Alpha Vantage, backtrader, and stockstats. The system implements a five-tier rating scale with recent additions like OpenAI Responses API integration, Anthropic effort control, and cross-platform UTF-8 standardization.

The framework is research-focused and not intended as financial advice, given that trading performance depends heavily on the backbone language models, temperature settings, market conditions, data quality, and various other non-deterministic factors.

# TradingAgents 调研报告

**项目名称：** TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework  
**GitHub：** https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents  
**论文：** arXiv:2412.20138  
**许可证：** Apache License 2.0  
**开发组织：** Tauric Research  
**编程语言：** Python（≥3.10）  
**最新版本：** v0.2.2（2026年3月22日发布）  
**Star：** 43,200 | Fork：**7,876**  
**数据截止：** 2026年3月28日

---

## 一、项目概述

TradingAgents 是一个**多智能体（Multi-Agent）LLM 金融交易框架**，由 Tauric Research 团队开发并完全开源。其设计理念是模拟真实世界中的投资交易公司运作模式，通过部署多个专业化的 LLM 驱动智能体（Fundamentals Analyst、Sentiment Analyst、Technical Analyst、Researcher、Trader、Risk Management 等），协同完成市场分析、策略制定与交易决策。

> **⚠️ 重要声明：** TradingAgents 框架明确声明**仅供研究目的使用**。交易表现会受到多种因素影响，包括所选基础语言模型、模型温度、交易时段、数据质量等非确定性因素。**本项目不构成金融、投资或交易建议。**（免责声明：https://tauric.ai/disclaimer/）

---

## 二、版本历史与最新动态

| 时间 | 版本 | 主要更新内容 |
|------|------|------------|
| 2026年3月 | **v0.2.2** | GPT-5.4/Gemini 3.1/Claude 4.6 模型覆盖；五级评级体系；OpenAI Responses API；Anthropic effort 控制；跨平台稳定性修复 |
| 2026年2月 | v0.2.0 | 多提供商 LLM 支持（GPT-5.x、Gemini 3.x、Claude 4.x、Grok 4.x）；改进系统架构 |
| 2026年1月 | Trading-R1 | 发布技术报告（arXiv:2509.11420），Terminal 项目即将发布 |

**近期提交亮点（2026年3月22日）：**
- `fix:` 为 yfinance 速率限制添加指数退避重试机制（#426）
- `feat:` 为 Claude 模型添加 Anthropic effort 级别支持（high/medium/low）
- `fix:` 使用 OpenAI Responses API 处理原生模型，支持 function tools 跨模型族使用
- `refactor:` 标准化投资组合管理器；五级评级量表；修复分析师状态追踪
- `chore:` 整合安装流程；修复 CLI 可移植性；统一 LLM 响应规范化

---

## 三、核心架构

TradingAgents 基于 **LangGraph** 构建，采用模块化和可扩展的设计思想。整体架构模拟真实交易公司的组织结构，分为以下几个核心层级：

### 3.1 分析师团队（Analyst Team）

分析师团队负责收集和初步分析各类市场数据，是整个决策流程的信息来源。

| 分析师类型 | 职责描述 |
|-----------|---------|
| **基本面分析师**（Fundamentals Analyst） | 评估公司财务状况和业绩指标，识别内在价值与潜在风险红旗 |
| **情绪分析师**（Sentiment Analyst） | 利用情绪评分算法分析社交媒体和公众情绪，衡量短期市场情绪 |
| **新闻分析师**（News Analyst） | 监测全球新闻和宏观经济指标，解读事件对市场条件的影响 |
| **技术分析师**（Technical Analyst） | 运用 MACD、RSI 等技术指标检测交易模式，预测价格走势 |

### 3.2 研究员团队（Researcher Team）

研究员团队由**看涨研究员**（Bullish Researcher）和**看跌研究员**（Bearish Researcher）组成，他们对分析师团队提供的洞察进行批判性评估，通过结构化的辩论平衡潜在收益与固有风险。

### 3.3 交易员代理（Trader Agent）

交易员负责综合分析师和研究员的报告，基于全面的市场洞察做出知情的交易决策，确定交易的时机和规模。

### 3.4 风险管理团队（Risk Management）

- **风险管理团队**：持续评估投资组合风险，评估市场波动性、流动性等风险因素，评估和调整交易策略，向投资组合经理提供评估报告。
- **投资组合经理**（Portfolio Manager）：批准/拒绝交易提案。若批准，订单将发送到模拟交易所执行。

---

## 四、技术架构详解

### 4.1 目录结构

```
tradingagents/
├── agents/               # 各类智能体实现
│   ├── analysts/        # 分析师智能体（基本面、技术、情绪、新闻）
│   ├── researchers/      # 研究员智能体（多空双方）
│   ├── trader/          # 交易员智能体
│   ├── risk_mgmt/        # 风险管理智能体
│   ├── managers/         # 投资组合管理器
│   └── utils/            # 工具函数
├── dataflows/            # 数据流程处理
├── graph/                # LangGraph 交易图定义
├── llm_clients/          # LLM 客户端（多提供商）
│   ├── openai_client.py
│   ├── anthropic_client.py
│   ├── google_client.py
│   └── factory.py        # 客户端工厂
├── default_config.py     # 默认配置
└── __init__.py
cli/                      # 命令行界面
tests/                    # 测试套件
```

### 4.2 核心依赖

| 依赖库 | 版本要求 | 用途 |
|--------|---------|------|
| **langgraph** | ≥0.4.8 | 多智能体状态图与工作流编排 |
| **langchain-core** | ≥0.3.81 | LLM 接口抽象 |
| **langchain-openai** | ≥0.3.23 | OpenAI 模型集成 |
| **langchain-anthropic** | ≥0.3.15 | Anthropic Claude 模型集成 |
| **langchain-google-genai** | ≥2.1.5 | Google Gemini 模型集成 |
| **backtrader** | ≥1.9.78.123 | 交易回测引擎 |
| **yfinance** | ≥0.2.63 | 雅虎财经数据接口 |
| **stockstats** | ≥0.6.5 | 技术指标计算 |
| **pandas** | ≥2.3.0 | 数据处理 |
| **rank-bm25** | ≥0.2.2 | BM25 排序算法 |
| **redis** | ≥6.2.0 | 缓存支持 |

### 4.3 LLM 提供商支持

TradingAgents 支持**多种 LLM 提供商**，通过统一的客户端工厂进行管理：

| 提供商 | 模型示例 | 特色功能 |
|--------|---------|---------|
| **OpenAI** | GPT-5.2、GPT-5-mini 等 | `reasoning_effort` 参数控制推理努力程度；OpenAI Responses API |
| **Google** | Gemini 3.x 系列 | `thinking_level` 控制思考深度 |
| **Anthropic** | Claude 4.x 系列 | `effort` 参数（high/medium/low） |
| **xAI** | Grok 4.x 系列 | — |
| **OpenRouter** | 多模型路由 | — |
| **Ollama** | 本地部署模型 | 支持本地模型运行 |

**默认配置：**
```python
DEFAULT_CONFIG = {
    "llm_provider": "openai",
    "deep_think_llm": "gpt-5.2",      # 复杂推理模型
    "quick_think_llm": "gpt-5-mini",  # 快速任务模型
    "max_debate_rounds": 1,           # 辩论轮次
    "max_risk_discuss_rounds": 1,      # 风险讨论轮次
    "max_recur_limit": 100,            # 最大递归限制
}
```

### 4.4 数据供应商配置

框架支持灵活的数据源配置，可在类别级别和工具级别进行覆盖：

```python
"data_vendors": {
    "core_stock_apis": "yfinance",       # 股票数据
    "technical_indicators": "yfinance",   # 技术指标
    "fundamental_data": "yfinance",       # 基本面数据
    "news_data": "yfinance",             # 新闻数据
}
# 可在 tool_vendors 中针对特定工具覆盖默认配置
```

---

## 五、使用方式

### 5.1 安装

```bash
# 克隆仓库
git clone https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents.git
cd TradingAgents

# 创建虚拟环境（推荐 Python 3.13）
conda create -n tradingagents python=3.13
conda activate tradingagents

# 安装
pip install .
```

### 5.2 环境变量配置

```bash
# 复制环境变量模板
cp .env.example .env

# 编辑 .env 填入 API Key
export OPENAI_API_KEY=...          # OpenAI
export GOOGLE_API_KEY=...          # Google Gemini
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=...       # Anthropic Claude
export XAI_API_KEY=...             # xAI Grok
export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=...      # OpenRouter
export ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY=...   # Alpha Vantage
```

### 5.3 命令行界面（CLI）

```bash
tradingagents  # 或 python -m cli.main
```

CLI 提供交互式界面，可选择：
- 股票代码（ticker）
- 分析日期
- LLM 提供商
- 研究深度
- 其他参数

运行时会实时显示各智能体的工作进度和结果。

### 5.4 Python 包使用

```python
from tradingagents.graph.trading_graph import TradingAgentsGraph
from tradingagents.default_config import DEFAULT_CONFIG

# 初始化
ta = TradingAgentsGraph(debug=True, config=DEFAULT_CONFIG.copy())

# 执行交易决策
_, decision = ta.propagate("NVDA", "2026-01-15")
print(decision)
```

**自定义配置示例：**
```python
config = DEFAULT_CONFIG.copy()
config["llm_provider"] = "openai"
config["deep_think_llm"] = "gpt-5.2"
config["quick_think_llm"] = "gpt-5-mini"
config["max_debate_rounds"] = 2

ta = TradingAgentsGraph(debug=True, config=config)
_, decision = ta.propagate("NVDA", "2026-01-15")
```

---

## 六、核心特性总结

| 特性 | 描述 |
|------|------|
| **多智能体协作** | 分析师、研究员、交易员、风险管理团队协同工作，模拟真实交易公司 |
| **多数据源** | 支持 yfinance、Alpha Vantage 等数据提供商 |
| **多 LLM 支持** | OpenAI、Google、Anthropic、xAI、OpenRouter、Ollama |
| **LangGraph 架构** | 基于状态图的工作流编排，模块化、可扩展 |
| **交互式 CLI** | 友好的命令行界面，实时显示分析进度 |
| **Python 包** | 灵活的 Python API，可嵌入到其他项目 |
| **五级评级体系** | v0.2.2 新增的标准化的投资建议评级量表 |
| **跨平台支持** | 修复了跨平台 UTF-8 编码一致性问题 |
| **容错机制** | yfinance 速率限制的指数退避重试机制 |

---

## 七、社区与生态

- **GitHub Stars：** 43,200+
- **Forks：** 7,876+
- **Open Issues：** 268
- **贡献者：** 活跃的开源社区
- **Discord 社区：** https://discord.com/invite/hk9PGKShPK
- **X (Twitter)：** @TauricResearch
- **微信：** TauricResearch
- **arXiv 论文：** https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.20138
- **Trading-R1 技术报告：** https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.11420

**相关项目：**
- Trading-R1：强化学习驱动的交易智能体（即将发布 Terminal）

---

## 八、风险提示与使用建议

> **⚠️ 重要风险提示：**
> 1. **仅供研究**：TradingAgents 明确声明不构成金融或投资建议
> 2. **性能不确定**：交易表现受模型选择、温度参数、交易时段、数据质量等多种因素影响
> 3. **模拟执行**：系统默认连接模拟交易所，不涉及真实资金
> 4. **LLM 局限性**：大语言模型存在幻觉问题，金融决策需谨慎验证
> 5. **数据依赖**：分析结果高度依赖数据源的质量和完整性

**使用建议：**
- 充分理解框架架构和 LLM 局限性后再进行实验
- 使用模拟交易验证策略有效性
- 不要将系统输出作为唯一投资决策依据
- 关注官方更新和社区反馈

---

## 九、总结

TradingAgents 是一个具有创新性的**多智能体 LLM 金融交易研究框架**，通过模拟真实交易公司的组织架构，将复杂的交易任务分解为多个专业化智能体的协同工作。框架基于 LangGraph 构建，具有良好的模块化和可扩展性，支持多种主流 LLM 提供商。

作为一个**开源研究项目**，TradingAgents 为金融 AI 领域的研究者提供了一个有价值的实验平台。但必须强调，任何投资决策都应基于全面的分析和独立的判断，系统输出仅供参考。

---

## 参考来源

1. TradingAgents GitHub Repository: https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents
2. arXiv:2412.20138 - TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework
3. arXiv:2509.11420 - Trading-R1 Technical Report
4. 项目官方文档及代码注释

---

*报告生成时间：2026年3月29日*  
*本报告仅供研究和学习参考，不构成任何投资建议。投资有风险，决策需谨慎。*

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*- """Convert TradingAgents research report from Markdown to PDF using reportlab.""" import io import sys import re # Try to use markdown library try: import markdown HAS_MARKDOWN = True except ImportError: HAS_MARKDOWN = False from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import A4 from reportlab.lib.styles import getSampleStyleSheet, ParagraphStyle from reportlab.lib.units import cm from reportlab.lib.colors import HexColor, black, white from reportlab.platypus import SimpleDocTemplate, Paragraph, Spacer, Table, TableStyle, PageBreak, HRFlowable from reportlab.lib.enums import TA_LEFT, TA_CENTER, TA_JUSTIFY from reportlab.pdfbase import pdfmetrics from reportlab.pdfbase.ttfonts import TTFont import os # Try to register Chinese font CHINESE_FONT = 'Helvetica' try: # Try common Windows Chinese font paths font_paths = [ 'C:/Windows/Fonts/msyh.ttc', # Microsoft YaHei 'C:/Windows/Fonts/simhei.ttf', 'C:/Windows/Fonts/simsun.ttc', 'C:/Windows/Fonts/arial.ttf', ] for fp in font_paths: if os.path.exists(fp): if fp.endswith('.ttc'): pdfmetrics.registerFont(TTFont('ChineseFont', fp, subfontIndex=0)) else: pdfmetrics.registerFont(TTFont('ChineseFont', fp)) CHINESE_FONT = 'ChineseFont' print(f"Registered font: {fp}") break except Exception as e: print(f"Font registration failed: {e}") PAGE_WIDTH, PAGE_HEIGHT = A4 def create_pdf(markdown_text, output_path): doc = SimpleDocTemplate( output_path, pagesize=A4, rightMargin=2*cm, leftMargin=2*cm, topMargin=2*cm, bottomMargin=2*cm, title="TradingAgents 调研报告", author="AI Research Assistant" ) # Styles styles = getSampleStyleSheet() title_style = ParagraphStyle( 'CustomTitle', parent=styles['Title'], fontName=CHINESE_FONT, fontSize=22, leading=30, alignment=TA_CENTER, spaceAfter=20, textColor=black, ) h1_style = ParagraphStyle( 'H1', parent=styles['Heading1'], fontName=CHINESE_FONT, fontSize=16, leading=22, spaceBefore=16, spaceAfter=10, textColor=black, ) h2_style = ParagraphStyle( 'H2', parent=styles['Heading2'], fontName=CHINESE_FONT, fontSize=13, leading=18, spaceBefore=12, spaceAfter=8, textColor=black, ) body_style = ParagraphStyle( 'Body', parent=styles['Normal'], fontName=CHINESE_FONT, fontSize=10, leading=15, alignment=TA_JUSTIFY, spaceBefore=4, spaceAfter=4, textColor=black, ) code_style = ParagraphStyle( 'Code', parent=styles['Code'], fontName='Courier', fontSize=8, leading=11, backColor=HexColor('#f5f5f5'), leftIndent=10, rightIndent=10, spaceBefore=6, spaceAfter=6, ) warn_style = ParagraphStyle( 'Warning', parent=styles['Normal'], fontName=CHINESE_FONT, fontSize=9, leading=13, textColor=HexColor('#cc0000'), leftIndent=10, rightIndent=10, spaceBefore=6, spaceAfter=6, ) story = [] # Parse markdown line by line lines = markdown_text.split('\n') i = 0 while i < len(lines): line = lines[i] # Skip empty lines if not line.strip(): i += 1 continue # Title (first line with #) if line.startswith('# ') and i == 0: story.append(Paragraph(line[2:].strip(), title_style)) story.append(Spacer(1, 10)) i += 1 continue # H1 if line.startswith('# ') and not line.startswith('## '): story.append(Spacer(1, 10)) story.append(Paragraph(line[2:].strip(), h1_style)) i += 1 continue # H2 if line.startswith('## '): story.append(Spacer(1, 8)) story.append(Paragraph(line[3:].strip(), h2_style)) i += 1 continue # H3 if line.startswith('### '): story.append(Paragraph(line[4:].strip(), h2_style)) i += 1 continue # Horizontal rule if line.startswith('---'): story.append(HRFlowable(width='100%', thickness=0.5, color=HexColor('#cccccc'))) i += 1 continue # Table if '|' in line and line.strip().startswith('|'): # Collect table rows table_lines = [] while i < len(lines) and '|' in lines[i] and lines[i].strip().startswith('|'): table_lines.append(lines[i].strip()) i += 1 # Parse table if len(table_lines) >= 2: # Check for separator row header_end = 1 for j in range(1, len(table_lines)): if set(table_lines[j].replace('-', '').replace(':', '').replace('|', '').replace(' ', '')) == set(): header_end = j break headers = [h.strip() for h in table_lines[0].split('|')[1:-1]] rows = [] for j in range(header_end + 1, len(table_lines)): row = [c.strip() for c in table_lines[j].split('|')[1:-1]] if any(row): rows.append(row) if headers and rows: data = [headers] + rows col_count = len(headers) col_width = (PAGE_WIDTH - 4*cm) / max(col_count, 1) # Ensure all rows have same column count for row in rows: while len(row) < col_count: row.append('') data = [headers] + rows t = Table(data, colWidths=[col_width] * col_count) t.setStyle(TableStyle([ ('BACKGROUND', (0, 0), (-1, 0), HexColor('#4a4a4a')), ('TEXTCOLOR', (0, 0), (-1, 0), white), ('FONTNAME', (0, 0), (-1, -1), CHINESE_FONT), ('FONTSIZE', (0, 0), (-1, -1), 8), ('FONTNAME', (0, 0), (-1, 0), CHINESE_FONT), ('FONTSIZE', (0, 0), (-1, 0), 8), ('BOTTOMPADDING', (0, 0), (-1, 0), 6), ('TOPPADDING', (0, 0), (-1, 0), 6), ('BACKGROUND', (0, 1), (-1, -1), white), ('GRID', (0, 0), (-1, -1), 0.5, HexColor('#cccccc')), ('ROWBACKGROUNDS', (0, 1), (-1, -1), [white, HexColor('#f9f9f9')]), ('LEFTPADDING', (0, 0), (-1, -1), 6), ('RIGHTPADDING', (0, 0), (-1, -1), 6), ('TOPPADDING', (0, 0), (-1, -1), 4), ('BOTTOMPADDING', (0, 0), (-1, -1), 4), ('VALIGN', (0, 0), (-1, -1), 'MIDDLE'), ])) story.append(t) story.append(Spacer(1, 10)) continue # Code block if line.startswith('```'): code_lines = [] i += 1 while i < len(lines) and not lines[i].startswith('```'): code_lines.append(lines[i]) i += 1 code_text = '\n'.join(code_lines) story.append(Paragraph(f"
{code_text}
", code_style)) i += 1 continue # Warning/Note block (starts with >) if line.startswith('> '): warn_lines = [] while i < len(lines) and (lines[i].startswith('> ') or lines[i].startswith('>')): warn_lines.append(lines[i][2:].strip()) i += 1 warn_text = '
'.join(warn_lines) story.append(Paragraph(warn_text, warn_style)) continue # Bullet list if line.startswith('- ') or line.startswith('* '): items = [] while i < len(lines) and (lines[i].startswith('- ') or lines[i].startswith('* ')): items.append(Paragraph('• ' + lines[i][2:].strip(), body_style)) i += 1 for item in items: story.append(item) continue # Numbered list num_match = re.match(r'^(\d+)\.\s+(.*)$', line) if num_match: items = [] while i < len(lines): m = re.match(r'^(\d+)\.\s+(.*)$', lines[i]) if m: items.append(Paragraph(f"{m.group(1)}. " + m.group(2), body_style)) i += 1 else: break for item in items: story.append(item) continue # Inline code # Process bold (**text**) line = re.sub(r'\*\*(.*?)\*\*', r'\1', line) # Process inline code (`code`) line = re.sub(r'`(.*?)`', r'\1', line) # Regular paragraph if line.strip(): story.append(Paragraph(line.strip(), body_style)) i += 1 # Build PDF doc.build(story) print(f"PDF created: {output_path}") if __name__ == '__main__': md_path = r'C:\Users\RickQ\.openclaw\workspace\outbox\trading-agents-research.md' pdf_path = r'C:\Users\RickQ\.openclaw\workspace\outbox\trading-agents-research.pdf' with open(md_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f: md_content = f.read() create_pdf(md_content, pdf_path)
